mapper.select: SELECT * FROM friend_request WHERE to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND status = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM friend_request WHERE from_user_id = #{fromUserId} AND to_user_id = #{toUserId} AND status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE friend_request SET status = 3, expire_time = NOW() WHERE status = 0 AND expire_time < NOW()
